scripts.dev: pnpm sync:data && pnpm --filter @chatwords/core build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/web dev
scripts.build: pnpm sync:data && pnpm --filter @chatwords/core build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/cli build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @chatwords/core build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @chatwords/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm sync:data && pnpm --filter @chatwords/core build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/core test && pnpm --filter @chatwords/web test
scripts.cli: pnpm --filter @chatwords/core build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/cli build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/cli dev
scripts.skill:install: pnpm --filter @chatwords/core build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/cli build && node scripts/install-skill.mjs
scripts.cf:build: pnpm sync:data && pnpm --filter @chatwords/core build && pnpm --filter @chatwords/web cf:build
